Capture concatenated pipe-delimited string of brand codes where the customer is in the top 10% of Marriott customers likely to book the brand, based on a booking propensity data science model. Brand codes are ordered by that customer's propensity score (highest to lowest) with a limit of 5 brands per customer.

Captures Concatenated pipe-delimited string of property codes where the customer is in the top 25% of Marriott customers likely to book the property, based on a booking propensity data science model. Property codes are ordered by that customer's propensity score (highest to lowest) with a limit of 10 properties per customer. Includes repeat to property only (no new to property).

Captures Concatenated pipe-delimited string of markets where the customer is in the top 10% of Marriott customers likely to book the market, based on a booking propensity data science model. Markets are ordered by that customer's propensity score (highest to lowest) with a limit of 10 markets per customer.

Captures Concatenated pipe-delimited string of property codes where the customer is in the top 25% of Marriott customers likely to book the property, based on a booking propensity data science model. Property codes are ordered by that customer's propensity score (highest to lowest) with a limit of 10 properties per customer. Includes repeat to property only (no new to property)

Captures Concatenated pipe-delimited string of brand codes where the customer is in the top 10% of Marriott customers likely to book the brand, based on a booking propensity data science model. Brand codes are ordered by that customer's propensity score (highest to lowest) with a limit of 5 brands per customer.

Captures concatenated pipe-delimited string of markets where the customer is in the top 10% of Marriott customers likely to book the market for leisure, based on a booking propensity data science model. Markets are ordered by that customer's propensity score (highest to lowest) with a limit of 10 markets per customer

Indicates whether a customer has provided permission to receive personalized services, such as tailored offers or recommendations, based on their preferences and consent status within their customer profile.
Indicates whether a customer has provided consent to receive email surveys, reflecting their preference for participating in feedback requests sent via email.

Indicates whether a customer has provided consent to receive promotional text messages, reflecting their preference for receiving marketing communications via SMS. Values typically represent consent status, such as “Y” or “N.”

Indicates whether a customer has provided consent to receive general postal communications, such as mailers or printed offers, from Marriott. Reflects the customer’s stated preference regarding physical mail outreach.

Indicates whether a customer has provided consent to receive transactional SMS messages, reflecting their communication preferences regarding booking confirmations, reservation updates, or other service-related notifications via text message.

Indicates whether a customer has provided consent to receive marketing communications via mobile push notifications, reflecting their preference for promotional messages sent directly to their mobile device during their engagement with Marriott.
Indicates whether a customer has chosen not to receive personalized advertising based on their preferences, reflecting their decision regarding participation in targeted marketing communications.

Indicates whether a customer has expressed a preference to restrict the sale of their personal information, reflecting their consent status regarding data sharing for commercial purposes within Marriott’s global operations.

Indicates whether a customer has expressed an objection to international data sharing or processing, reflecting their preferences regarding the handling of personal information across global locations.

Indicates the most recent date on which a customers consent preferences were updated, reflecting the latest changes made to their permissions or agreements regarding the use of their personal information.
A date storing customer birth MONTH and DAY, combined with 1896 as the YEAR to form the full birth date.
